findings.location: SQLログの出力例 section (=== heading in source)
findings.description: The entire 'SQLログの出力例' section content is absent from the knowledge file. The knowledge file uses this as its title but never materializes a section for it. The missing content includes: (1) log.properties configuration example with writerNames, FileLogWriter, BasicLogFormatter, SQL logger nameRegex/level/writerNames settings; (2) app-log.properties sqlLogFormatter settings — startRetrieveFormat and endRetrieveFormat — which introduce new placeholders not covered elsewhere: $startPosition$, $size$, $retrieveTime$, $count$; (3) concrete sample log output showing actual log lines with timestamps, log levels, and request/user/execution IDs.
findings.source_evidence: Source section 'SQLログの出力例' (===) contains log.properties example, app-log.properties example with sqlLogFormatter.startRetrieveFormat and sqlLogFormatter.endRetrieveFormat, and a multi-line sample output block ending with JdbcTransaction#commit().
